Defendants' 1990 Folsom Housing Associates, Lp, Nibbi Bros, Inc., And Azul Works Holding, Inc'S Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Nadim Hegazi of Collons, Collins, Muir & Stewart (510)844-5112 for the Defendant Nibbi Bros, Inc.,moving party.

Attorney Dominic V. Signorotti of Brothers Smith (925)944-9700 for the Plaintiff Lumberman Construction Supply, Inc., opposing party by phone.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of Defendants' 1990 Folsom Housing Associates, Lp, Nibbi Bros, Inc., And Azul Works Holding, Inc'S Motion To Strike, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for attorney's fees. Plaintiff fails to allege any basis for recovery of such fees. Plaintiff may bring a motion for leave to amend when Plaintiff is able to allege in good faith facts giving rise to this request. Motion is otherwise denied. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (501)
